headline: Tino Livramento
body: We can confirm that Tino Livramento has successfully undergone a minor surgical procedure. The defender, who returned from World Cup duty with an injury, is expected to return during pre-season. Wishing you a speedy recovery, tino_livramento 💪
raw_text:
We can confirm that Tino Livramento has successfully undergone a minor surgical procedure.

The defender, who returned from World Cup duty with an injury, is expected to return during pre-season.

Wishing you a speedy recovery, @tino_livramento 💪
